meta.description: Receives the OmniProject gateway's licence hand-off (LICENSE_FULFILLMENT_URL), verifies the optional HMAC signature, and emails the buyer their key. Set a SMTP credential on 'Email the licence'.

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: Set this URL as LICENSE_FULFILLMENT_URL in the OmniProject sales gateway. The gateway POSTs { licenseKey, customer, email, tier, features, expiresAt, provider, orderId }.

nodes.name: Compute HMAC
nodes.notes: Recompute the HMAC of the body so we can compare it to the X-OmniProject-Signature header the gateway sends.

nodes.name: Authentic?
nodes.notes: Pass when no LICENSE_FULFILLMENT_SECRET is configured (signature optional) OR when the HMAC matches the header. False branch returns 401.

nodes.name: Email the licence
nodes.notes: Attach YOUR SMTP credential here (Gmail, Postmark, SES, Resend SMTP, …). Or swap this for a SendGrid/Resend/Gmail node.
